about.label: Our Story
about.body1: Nestled among towering pines, ancient olive groves, and fragrant lemon trees, Epidavros Resort is an invitation to experience the perfect harmony between breathtaking natural beauty, serene tranquility, and refined luxury — all just steps from the crystal shores of the Saronic Gulf.
about.body2: For over two decades, our family has welcomed guests from around the world to this living garden by the sea. Every morning begins with a homemade breakfast under the olives; every evening ends with the endless glow of a Greek sunset painting the water gold.

rooms.label: Accommodation
rooms.title: Find Your Perfect Villa
rooms.subtitle: From cosy retreats to panoramic suites, each villa has been crafted to bring you closer to the magic of Epidavros.

safetyItems.securityCameras: Security cameras in common outdoor areas

rooms.priceNote: Starting price per night · taxes included
rooms.perk1: Free cancellation up to 7 days before

voukamvilia.subtitle: Bougainvillea Villa
voukamvilia.description: Named after the cascading bougainvillea that frames its sun-drenched terrace, this villa is pure Mediterranean romance. A king-size bed, marble en-suite with a deep soaking tub, and unobstructed views of the Saronic Gulf — a sanctuary built for two.

gardenia.subtitle: Garden Deluxe Room
gardenia.description: Surrounded by fragrant gardenias and shaded olive boughs, this serene room opens onto a private terrace where morning light filters softly through the trees. A queen bed, walk-in rain shower, and handcrafted local furnishings complete the picture.

dafni.subtitle: Classic Double Room
dafni.description: Named for the sacred laurel (dafni) of ancient Greece, this beautifully appointed room is a quiet retreat for two. Crisp whitewashed walls, a marble bathroom, and a small balcony overlooking the pine-clad hillside — simple and perfect.

elia.subtitle: Family Suite
elia.description: Elia — the olive tree — has sheltered Greek families for millennia. This two-room suite does the same, with a master bedroom, a children's bunk room, a spacious living area, and a generous sea-view terrace where everyone can gather under the Greek sun.

thymari.subtitle: Poolside Bungalow
thymari.description: Wild thyme grows across the hillside above this ground-floor bungalow, filling the air with its scent on warm evenings. Step from your private stone patio straight into the sparkling pool. A king bed, exposed stone walls, and an outdoor shower complete the experience.

rodia.subtitle: Panorama Penthouse
rodia.description: The pomegranate — rodia — is a Greek symbol of abundance and joy. At the crown of the estate, this penthouse delivers both: 360° sea views, a private plunge pool on the terrace, a gourmet kitchen stocked with local produce, and bespoke design throughout.

area.label: Explore the Region
area.title: Discover Epidavros
area.subtitle: A corner of Greece where ancient myth, Mediterranean nature, and crystalline sea come together in perfect harmony.
area.body1: Nea Epidavros sits at the heart of the Argolid peninsula, where pine-clad mountains descend to the crystalline waters of the Saronic Gulf. Within a short drive you'll find UNESCO World Heritage sites, charming fishing villages, and some of the most beautiful beaches in the Peloponnese.
area.body2: The estate itself sits within an ancient olive grove — a living Eco Farm producing olive oil, citrus and herbs. Culture, nature and history are not attractions you visit here; they are the air you breathe.
area.theatreDesc: One of the best-preserved ancient theatres in the world — a UNESCO World Heritage Site with legendary acoustics. Home to the Athens-Epidaurus Festival every July and August.
area.littleTheatreDesc: A smaller but equally evocative ancient theatre nestled in the village of Palea Epidavros. Also part of the Athens-Epidaurus Festival programme, offering intimate performances in a stunning open-air setting.
area.asklepionDesc: The most celebrated healing sanctuary of the ancient world, dedicated to Asclepius the god of medicine. Patients from across the Mediterranean came here seeking cures.
area.beachDesc: A peaceful pebble-and-sand beach on the Saronic Gulf, just minutes from the estate. Clear shallow waters perfect for swimming, snorkelling and long afternoon strolls.
area.paleaDesc: A charming fishing village with a small ancient theatre, a picturesque harbour, and fresh seafood tavernas — perfect for a relaxed evening.
area.nafplioDesc: Greece's first modern capital and one of the country's most romantic towns — Venetian architecture, the Palamidi fortress, and cobblestone alleyways await.
area.mycenaeDesc: The legendary citadel of Agamemnon, birthplace of Mycenaean civilisation. The Lion Gate and Treasury of Atreus are among Europe's most iconic prehistoric monuments.
area.canalDesc: A marvel of 19th-century engineering that slices through the Isthmus of Corinth, connecting the Saronic and Corinthian gulfs. A spectacular sight from the bridge above.
area.farmDesc: Ancient olive groves, fragrant lemon trees, and organic gardens surround the estate — a living farm producing olive oil, citrus and herbs you can taste and take home.

gallery.label: The Estate
gallery.title: Life at Epidavros
gallery.subtitle: Towering pines, ancient olive groves, fragrant lemon trees — and the endless shimmer of the Saronic Gulf.

testimonials.label: Guest Stories
testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from travellers who found their perfect retreat at Epidavros Resort.
testimonials.r1text: The hosts were super friendly, responsive, and answered whatever questions you may have had. On my way to the house they were a great help to find it. The location is truly more beautiful than any photo could capture. The house is very clean, cute and peaceful, everything felt so comfortable and convenient when staying. Excellent stay, would recommend this place!
testimonials.r2text: A stunning place in nature, distinguished by its aesthetics and atmosphere. The hospitality was warm, friendly and truly impeccable. The ideal combination for an exceptional experience in beautiful Epidaurus.
testimonials.r3text: The Voukamvilia cottage is a gem. Bougainvillea cascades over the stone walls, the private pool sparkles in the afternoon light, and every morning breakfast was a feast of local produce. Perfectly peaceful — exactly what we needed.

seo.title: Epidavros Villas & Suites | Akros Eco Farm — Nea Epidavros, Greece
seo.description: Luxury villas near the ancient Theatre of Epidaurus. Shared pool, sea views, 1 km from the beach of Nea Epidavros. Book direct for the best rates.
seo.ogTitle: Epidavros Villas & Suites | Akros Eco Farm
seo.ogDescription: Six unique eco villas with sea views, shared pool, and organic gardens in Nea Epidavros. Experience the perfect harmony of nature and luxury on the Saronic Gulf.
